name: Clamagore (SS-343)
events: 18 Jul 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Newport, Rhode Island for torpedo trials.
19 Jul 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) arived at Newport, Rhode Island from New London, Connecticut for torpedo trials.
21 Jul 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN), departed Newport, Rhode Island and arrived at New London, Connecticut.
10 Aug 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Panama Canal Zone.
18 Aug 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone from New London, Connecticut.
1 Sep 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Key West, Florida.
5 Sep 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from the Panama Canal Zone. She departed Key West for Port Everglades, Florida later the same day.
6 Sep 1945 USS Clamagore (Cdr. S.C. Loomis, USN) arrived at Port Everglades, Florida from Key West, Florida.
